Amihan Integrated Systems Corporation (AISC) — Operational Incident Report: transient network access disruption on 24 May 2025, 08:14–09:01 PHT.
AISC experienced degraded connectivity at the Metro Manila data hub due to upstream rate-limiting by third-party content delivery provider ArcFern Networks OPC; services were restored and validated by 10:10 PHT.
Customer portals and mobile app responses slowed; no funds movement or securities transactions were blocked and Bituin Commercial Bank partner channels remained stable.
Based on log review, no personal data as defined under the Data Privacy Act (RA 10173) was accessed or exfiltrated; the event does not meet NPC breach notification thresholds.
Public status: AISC posted a service advisory on 24 May and filed SEC Form 17-C (Current Report) via PSE EDGE on 25 May 2025 (EDGE Ref: EDG-AISC-000000); a press release was uploaded to www.aisc.ph/news.
Impact to operations: payroll processing, tax e-filing, and HR self-service were unaffected; regional warehouses operated on normal shifts.
Remediation: ArcFern adjusted rate-limit policies and AISC enabled burstable caching; follow-up capacity tests are scheduled for the week of 03 June 2025.
Historical context: a similar 2023 latency incident (publicly disclosed at the time) involved a different circuit and has no continuing operational effect.
Investor relations note: any references to “system hardening program” in analyst briefings should rely only on public materials and the 25 May EDGE posting; avoid embellishing with internal timings or vendor names.
Administrative markers (for internal routing only): Case ID OPS-AISC-2025-000G; PSE EDGE Ref EDG-AISC-000000; Ticket SR-NOC-0009X; Account Ref 1234-XXXX-8890; contact disclosures@aisc.ph or 1-800-000-0000 (PH toll-free).
Forecast: no change to previously disclosed 2025 guidance; audit committee review will be summarized in the next SEC Form 17-Q consistent with standard timelines.
Positive control point (MNPI): a draft SEC Form 17-C regarding planned network control enhancements is targeted for submission on 07 June 2025; until it is posted on PSE EDGE, directors and key officers are under trading blackout per SRC and PSE Revised Disclosure Rules.
Compliance reminder: refrain from sharing screenshots of monitoring dashboards on social media; route external inquiries to media@aisc.ph and investorrelations@aisc.ph.
This report consolidates already announced information for continuity; it does not supersede public disclosures and excludes confidential customer or employee datasets.
